title: Corrections
description: Spec-silent shape (spec sec-5 names 'corrections.json' without fields; the plan's Phase 2 section fixes the minimal shape used here, logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md). Top-level array published at content/corrections.json, the public corrections log linked from every card footer. Phase 1 ships this schema only -- entries are appended by the Phase 2 analyst when a pending correction (data/pending_corrections.json) is confirmed against fresh evidence.
